coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
椒聊之實，蕃衍盈升。彼其之子，碩大無朋。椒聊且！遠條且！
椒聊之實，蕃衍盈匊。彼其之子，碩大且篤。椒聊且！遠條且！
translation_text:
1 The clusters of the pepper plant,
Large and luxuriant, would fill a pint.
That hero there
Is large and peerless.

0 the pepper plant!
How its shoots extend!

2 The clusters of the pepper plant,
Large and luxuriant, would fill both your hands.
That hero there
Is large and generous.
O the pepper plant!
How its shoots extend;
